title: Milestone Camping 18889 Pop Up Beach Tent With Extendable Ground Sheet / UV50+ Protection/Water Resistant/Portable Carry Bag Included / 2 Security Pockets / 110cm x 150cm x 165cm
seller_info_text: Hartes Department Store & Christmas Shop Blackpool
features: POP-UP BEACH TENT – This portable beach tent with extendable ground sheet is extremely easy to assemble thanks to the unique pop-up functionality, and instantly allows you to set up a base for long days on the beach with your friends and family.

WEATHERPROOF DESIGN – This beach tent is water resistant, and can withstand rain if the weather turns bad, as well as exposure to seawater. The tent is constructed from 190T polyester material, and features a UV50+ element to further protect you from the suns harmful rays.

LIGHTWEIGHT & PORTABLE – This camping tent comes in a carry bag which is lightweight, portable and ideal for storage when not in use. Its slimline design makes it easy to take away on any trip to the beach, and comes complete with 2 security pouches for your valuables.

PERFECT SIZE – This pop-up tent measures of H110 x W150 x D165cm when fully open, and has a diameter of just 46cm when enclosed in the bag. The tent comes complete with Guy Ropes & heavy-duty tent pegs to secure the base in the sand, as well as a mesh window for added ventilation.

MILESTONE CAMPING – Milestone Camping is the leading manufacturer of everything you need to enjoy the great outdoors. From tents and sleeping bags, to chairs and camp cutlery, visit the Milestone Camping page on Amazon to view the whole range today.
description: Product Description UV50+ Protection Pop-Up Beach Tent This portable beach tent with an extendable ground sheet is extremely easy to assemble thanks to its pop-up functionality and allows you to set up a base for long days on the beach with your friends and family. This tent is water resistant and can withstand rain if the weather turns bad, as well as exposure to seawater. The tent is constructed from 190T polyester material and features UV50+ protection for all-day shade at the park, beach, festivals or while relaxing in the garden. Previous page Carry Bag This tent comes in a carry bag which is light, portable, and ideal for storage when not in use. Slimline Design Its slimline design makes it ideal for the beach & it comes with 2 security pouches for valuables. UV50+ Protection The tent features UV50+ Protection from the sun and is water resistant, including seawater. Versatile In addition to a beach shelter, the tent can be used as an indoor or garden play tent for children. Easy Set Up Includes guy ropes & tent pegs to secure the base in the sand, plus a mesh window for ventilation. Next page 1 Carry Bag 2 Slimline Design 3 UV50+ Protection 4 Versatile 5 Easy Set Up
